meaning: 光标资源文件n.杂种,坏种,恶狗,卑贱的人,胆怯的家伙
examples: A cur barking at the sun cannot detract from its glory.
A wild cur flung itself at him with bared fangs and slashed a rent in his overcoat.
This cur rent will gradually decay to a steady value.
Hence, no one is really aware of the totality of the levy, which in Europe cur rently averages around 20% or higher.
